disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly spreading, hot, tender unilateral leg redness from an insect-bite entry point, with a low-grade orange-peel appearance
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading and hot, and is it on one leg only?
Is there a break in the skin (bite/cut) where it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's one leg, spreading up fast from where an insect bit me, hot and very tender.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fever, rigors and feeling systemically unwell (systemic inflammatory response)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, shaking chills, or feeling very unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, high fever, shaking chills all afternoon and I feel really unwell.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No pain wildly out of proportion, no purple/black blisters, no crackling under the skin, no skin numbness (necrotising-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain far worse than the skin looks, or are there purple/black blisters, crackling under the skin, or numb patches?
Any dusky discolouration or skin that feels numb?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No purple blisters or numb patches, and no crackling — it's very sore but not out of all proportion to how it looks.
